content.text: Which payment provider should I integrate first - Stripe or PayPal?

message.content: Go with Stripe first, it matches our existing stack.

content.text: Understood - I will wire up Stripe checkout using the existing payments module.
Running the Stripe CLI to scaffold the webhook handler.
Webhook handler scaffolded and verified. Stripe checkout is ready.

message.content: Stop - do not add the discount engine yet, keep the checkout minimal.

content.text: Got it - reverting the discount-engine changes and keeping checkout minimal.
Should I deploy to staging or wait for your review?

message.content: Deploy to staging, then ping me for the prod review.
